name: useBattery
description: Hook for getting information about battery status
examples: const { supported, loading, charging, chargingTime, dischargingTime, level } = useBattery();

apiParameters.name: Object
apiParameters.description: containing battery information & Battery API support

source.source: * @returns {UseBatteryStateReturn} Object containing battery information & Battery API support
